description: Quantization efficiency. Same model (Llama-3-8B) at three precision levels: BF16, INT8, INT4. Measures the speed/quality tradeoff of quantization on a single chip.
_precision_levels_note: BF16 = full precision baseline. INT8 = W8A8 via vLLM bitsandbytes or compressed-tensors. INT4 = W4A16 via AWQ.
_accuracy_note: Threshold is wider than other suites (0.05 vs 0.03) because quantization reduces accuracy. Valid if score ≥ baseline − 0.05. INT4 submissions scoring more than 0.05 below the BF16 baseline are flagged.
